name: Phlix Official Plugins
description: The default plugin catalog for Phlix. Add this as a plugin source in the admin Plugins section, then install plugins straight from the list.

plugins.name: phlix-plugin-anidb
plugins.title: AniDB
plugins.description: AniDB metadata provider — anime titles, descriptions, episodes and ratings via the AniDB UDP API and daily title dump.
plugins.author: detain

plugins.name: phlix-plugin-anilist
plugins.title: AniList
plugins.summary: Anime metadata and watchlist sync from AniList.
plugins.description: AniList metadata provider — anime/manga metadata, watchlist sync, and GraphQL integration via the AniList API.
plugins.author: detain

plugins.name: phlix-plugin-lastfm
plugins.title: Last.fm
plugins.description: Last.fm scrobbler — scrobbles music playback to Last.fm, marking now-playing on start and submitting the scrobble at the end.
plugins.author: detain

plugins.name: phlix-plugin-musicbrainz
plugins.title: MusicBrainz
plugins.description: MusicBrainz metadata provider — artist/album/track metadata, album art via Cover Art Archive, and AcoustID integration.
plugins.author: detain

plugins.name: phlix-plugin-myanimelist
plugins.title: MyAnimeList
plugins.description: MyAnimeList metadata provider — anime/manga search, details and rankings via the MAL API v2.
plugins.author: detain

plugins.name: phlix-plugin-omdb
plugins.title: OMDb
plugins.description: OMDb metadata provider — IMDb ID resolution, Rotten Tomatoes, Metascore, and IMDb ratings for movies and TV via the OMDb API.
plugins.author: detain

plugins.name: phlix-plugin-opensubtitles
plugins.title: OpenSubtitles
plugins.description: OpenSubtitles subtitle provider — search and download subtitles for movies and TV shows via the OpenSubtitles REST API, supporting search by IMDB ID, filename, and file hash.
plugins.author: detain

plugins.name: phlix-plugin-trakt
plugins.title: Trakt
plugins.description: Trakt scrobbler — scrobbles playback to Trakt.tv and syncs watch history over the Trakt OAuth API.
plugins.author: detain
